things.name: Badshahi Mosque
things.description: 17th-century Mughal mosque - one of the world's largest with a marble-paved courtyard

things.name: Lahore Fort (Shahi Qila)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Mughal fortress with the Sheesh Mahal (Palace of Mirrors)

things.name: Shalimar Gardens
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 17th-century Mughal terraced gardens with 410 fountains

things.name: Walled City of Lahore
things.description: Ancient walled old city with 13 gates, Wazir Khan Mosque and the Anarkali Bazaar

things.name: Lahore Museum
things.description: Pakistan's finest museum with the Fasting Siddhartha sculpture and Mughal antiquities

things.name: Minar-e-Pakistan
things.description: 1968 monument marking where Pakistan's independence resolution was passed in 1940

things.name: Data Darbar Shrine
things.description: South Asia's largest Sufi shrine with Thursday qawwali music performances

things.name: Wagah Border Ceremony
things.description: Theatrical Pakistani-Indian flag-lowering ceremony at the Wagah border crossing

things.name: Food Street (Fort Road)
things.description: Evening food street opposite the floodlit Badshahi Mosque - Lahori specialties

things.name: Cooco's Den Restaurant
things.description: Rooftop restaurant inside a haveli opposite the Badshahi Mosque - the best view in Lahore
